zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies於1443年出生在蘇格蘭維托史爾時，他的父親William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto35歲，母親Elizabeth Arnot33歲。他和Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1500年在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه特拉布宗特拉布宗享年57歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭維托史爾加利艾斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies于1443年出生在苏格兰維托史爾时，他的父亲William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto35岁，母亲Elizabeth Arnot33岁。他和Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1500年在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه特拉布宗特拉布宗享年57岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰維托史爾加利艾斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexandert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.description: Conquest of Constantinople (Istanbul) by Sultan Mehmet II, "the Conqueror".

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies was born in 1443, in Wigtownshire, Scotland, his father, William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto, was 35 and his mother, Elizabeth Arnot, was 33. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers. He died in 1500, in Trabzon, Trabzon, Ottoman Empire, at the age of 57, and was buried in Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Traquhair, Peeblesshire, Scotland: Traquair, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies est né en 1443, à Wigtownshire, Écosse, son père, William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Arnot, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers. Il est décédé en 1500, à Trabzon, Trabzon, Empire ottoman, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies 1443 in Wigtownshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto 35 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Arnot 33. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1500 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Trabzon, Trabzon, Osmanisches Reich und wurde in Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies è nato il nel 1443 nel Wigtownshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Arnot, aveva 33 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers. Morì nel 1500, nel Trabzon, Trabzon, Impero ottomano, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garliesが1443年にスコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Mintoは35歳，母Elizabeth Arnotは33歳であった。彼はElizabeth Douglas of Caversとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1500年にオスマン帝国トラブゾントラブゾンで57歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアガーリーストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies(이)가 1443년 스컷랜드 위그타운실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Arnot(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1500년 دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه 트라브존 트라브존에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 위그타운실르 가리스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies nasceu em 1443, em Wigtownshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Arnot, tinha 33 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers. Ele faleceu em 1500, em Trabzon, Trabzon, Império Otomano, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies родился в 1443 г. в местности вигтоуншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Arnot, 33. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers. Он умер в 1500 г. в местности трабзон, трабзон, Османская империя в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности гарлиестон, вигтоуншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies nació en 1443, en Wigtownshire, Scotland, su papá, William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Arnot, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers. Murió en 1500, en Trabzon, Trabzon, Imperio otomano, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
